s1.title: Creation System
s1.description: A conscious approach at Khiva Code is a system, not a separate stage. Sustainability is embedded in everything: from idea and design to production, materials and product lifespan. We create timeless pieces — with minimalist form, refined proportions and thoughtful construction. The foundation is fabric quality, precision cutting and durability in everyday wear. Production is built rationally: without excessive volumes, with process control and waste minimization. Even packaging follows the principle of functionality and purity. Each piece has value not only at the moment of purchase, but also in long-term use.

s2.title: System
s2.description: Sustainability at Khiva Code is built on specific solutions:
items: timeless design without attachment to fast trends
s2.closing: We create clothing as a wardrobe foundation, not as a temporary product. Khiva Code is about conscious choice, where every detail matters and remains relevant beyond one season.

materials.name: Form
materials.description: Clean silhouettes inspired by the architectural geometry of Khiva.

materials.name: Fabric
materials.description: Fabrics selected for comfort, quality and durability.

materials.name: Color
materials.description: A palette inspired by the sandy walls, ceramics and sky of the ancient city.

materials.name: Details
materials.description: Minimalist elements where every detail has meaning.

materials.name: Durability
materials.description: Pieces created beyond seasonal trends and designed for long-term use.
